name: Opus 4.7 Thinking Display Override (Wave 3, Request-Shape Observation)
description: Opus 4.7 defaults thinking.display to 'omitted' (silent change from Opus 4.6, which defaults to 'summarized'). Tests whether CC v2.1.112 explicitly passes thinking.display: 'summarized' on Opus 4.7 to preserve the Opus 4.6 behavior, or accepts the 'omitted' default. Evidence is request-only: inspect whether ogCapture.parsedBody.thinking.display field is present and what its value is.
prompt: Think carefully about this: what is the greatest common divisor of 1071 and 462?
expectedBehavior: body.thinking = {type: 'adaptive'} (manual 'enabled' would 400 on Opus 4.7 per live API). Record whether body.thinking.display is: (a) explicitly 'summarized' — CC overrides the new default to preserve summarized behavior; (b) explicitly 'omitted' — CC embraces the new default; (c) absent — CC relies on the Opus 4.7 default. Each case has a distinct Phase 3 port plan (see Task 1.3 claim table).
